questionText: Are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific GHGs, activities, geographies, etc.) of Scope 1, Scope 2 or Scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data?
questionKo: 귀사가 선택한 보고경계 안에서 공개에 포함하지 않은 Scope 1, Scope 2 또는 Scope 3 배출원(예: 설비, 특정 온실가스, 활동, 지역 등)이 있습니까?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: In some cases it can be difficult to gather data for all sources. Circumstances where this might be the case include sources in countries/areas or small facilities where data acquisition is difficult or unreliable. Structural changes to the organization including mergers, acquisitions and divestments can also be reasons where emissions data are not included in your disclosure. This question enables companies to report where these sources are not included in the disclosure and thus provides data users transparency into reported emissions inventories.

guidance.text:
General 
Identify sources that would normally be within the boundary determined by the consolidation approach that you have chosen for your disclosure in 6.1 (i.e. financial control, operational control, equity share or other) but for which greenhouse gases are not reported in this disclosure. Excluded sources may be in a particular country/area or represent a number of very small facilities making it difficult to gather data.
Common reasons for exclusions, both relevant or not relevant, can include the following:
Incomplete information for the period in question;
Structural changes to the organization including mergers, acquisitions and divestments;
Outsourcing and/or insourcing of activities; and
Unreliable information.
The GHG Protocol's Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard notes on the reporting of exclusions (page 9) that "Specific exclusions…need to be clearly identified and justified, assumptions disclosed, and appropriate references provided for the methodologies applied and the data sources used. The information should be sufficient to enable a third party to derive the same results if provided with the same source data."
If you selected 'No' in column 1 ‘'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' of 1.5 and there are entities included in your consolidated accounting group that are not included in your reporting boundary, select 'Yes' and provide details on the exclusion of these entities in 7.4.1.
Only select "No" if your answers to 7.6, 7.7, and 7.8 represent the total gross global emissions of all the companies, businesses, other entities or groups determined by your consolidation approach (provided in 6.1).
guidance.textKo: 일반 Identify sources that would normally be within the boundary determined by the consolidation approach that you have chosen 귀사의 disclosure in 6.1 (i.e. financial control, operational control, equity share 또는 other) but for which greenhouse gases are not 보고 in this disclosure. Excluded sources may be in a particular country/area 또는 represent a number of very small facilities making it difficult to gather data. Common reasons for 제외사항, both relevant 또는 not relevant, can include the following: Incomplete information 에 대한 period in 문항; Structural changes to the organization 포함 mergers, acquisitions 및 divestments; Outsourcing 및/또는 insourcing of activities; 및 Unreliable information. The GHG Protocol's Corporate Accounting 및 Reporting Standard notes on the reporting of 제외사항 (page 9) that "Specific 제외사항…need to be clearly identified 및 justified, assumptions 공개, 및 appropriate references 입력 에 대한 methodologies applied 및 the data sources used. The information 해야 합니다 be sufficient to enable a third party to derive the same results 만약 입력 with the same source data." 만약 you 선택 '아니요' in 열 1 ‘'Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your 재무제표?' of 1.5 및 there are entities included in your consolidated accounting group that are not included in your 보고경계, select '예' 및 세부 정보를 입력 on the exclusion 의se entities in 7.4.1. Only select "아니요" 만약 your answers to 7.6, 7.7, 및 7.8 represent the total 전 세계 총 emissions of all the companies, businesses, other entities 또는 groups determined by your consolidation approach (입력 in 6.1).

guidance.text: Companies report emissions from all sources, and are transparent on all exclusions.
guidance.textKo: Companies report emissions from all sources, 및 are transparent on all 제외사항.

change.question_ko: 선택한 보고 경계 내에 있지만 공개에 포함되지 않은 Scope 1, Scope 2 또는 Scope 3 배출원 ( 예 : 시설 , 특정 온실가스 , 활동 , 지역 등 ) 이 있습니까 ? ` M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change 예 아니오
change.q2025_text: Are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific GHGs, activities, geographies, etc.) of Scope 1, Scope 2 or Scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data?
change.change_summary: Change to question text from "Are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific GHGs, activities, geographies, etc.) of Scope 1, Scope 2 or Scope 3 emissions that are within your selected reporting boundary which are not included in your disclosure?" to "Are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific GHGs, activities, geographies, etc.) of Scope 1, Scope 2 or Scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data?"

2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: In some cases it can be difficult to gather data for all sources. Circumstances 여기서 this might be the case include sources in countries/areas 또는 small facilities 여기서 data acquisition is difficult 또는 unreliable. Structural changes to the organization 포함 mergers, acquisitions 및 divestments can also be reasons 여기서 배출량 데이터 are not included in your disclosure. This 문항 enables companies to report 여기서 these sources are not included in the disclosure 및 thus provides 데이터 사용자 transparency into 보고 emissions inventories.
